---
title: "404 Not Found"
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.fs-3}
The page that you are looking for may have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.

Try using the {{< fa magnifying-glass >}} **search button** in the top right corner.

Taking you back to the [home page](/) in **<span id="redirect-countdown">10</span>** seconds.
:::

<script>
  window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const redirectUrl = "/";
    let secondsRemaining = 10;
    const countdown = document.getElementById("redirect-countdown");

    if (!countdown) return;

    const timer = window.setInterval(function () {
      secondsRemaining -= 1;

      if (secondsRemaining <= 0) {
        countdown.textContent = "0";
        window.clearInterval(timer);
        window.location.replace(redirectUrl);
        return;
      }

      countdown.textContent = String(secondsRemaining);
    }, 1000);
  });
</script>
